summary: Full-stack testing completed for SafeHer women's travel safety app. Backend: 100% pass (22/22 tests). Frontend: All critical flows verified working. SMS/Calls MOCKED via in-app alerts. AI route analysis using Gemini working correctly.

tests_executed: User registration (new user + duplicate email prevention)
Add trusted contact with persistence verification
Create incident report with persistence verification
Get transport safety scores (6 seeded routes verified)
Trigger SOS alert with persistence verification (MOCKED SMS)
AI route analysis with Gemini (3 routes generated with safety scores)

flows_tested: Auth screen load and UI display
User registration flow (form fill, submit, navigate to home)
Home dashboard with 3 travel mode cards (Cab, Transport, Walk)
Bottom action bar with 4 buttons (SOS, Suspicious, Report, Call)
Trusted contacts screen (displays existing contacts, correctly enforces max 3 limit)
Ride check flow (fill trip details, start monitoring, live monitoring active)
Transport safety scores display (6 routes with color-coded safety indicators)
Report incident screen with incident type selection
Profile screen display with user info and logout button

critical_code_review_comments: All interactive elements have proper testID attributes for testing
React Native components used correctly (View, Text, TouchableOpacity)
All API calls use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from environment
JWT authentication properly implemented with AsyncStorage
MongoDB ObjectId excluded from API responses
Error handling present in all API calls
Logout requires user confirmation via Alert dialog (expected UX pattern)
Max 3 trusted contacts limit correctly enforced on both backend and frontend
StyleSheet.create() used for all styles (no CSS)
Proper mobile spacing and touch target sizes observed
seed_data_creation: Backend seed endpoint loads 6 transport safety scores (Bus Route 401, 205, 112, 303, Metro Green Line, Metro Blue Line). Test contacts created during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full app tested successfully. Auth flow works (register/login). All 10 backend API endpoints verified with CREATE→GET persistence checks. Frontend UI correctly displays all screens. SMS/Calls are MOCKED - simulated via in-app alerts (as designed). AI route analysis using Gemini via Emergent LLM key working. Logout shows confirmation alert before executing (expected behavior). Contacts screen correctly hides add button when max 3 contacts reached (backend enforcement working).

mocked_integrations.sms_alerts: MOCKED - Twilio SMS simulation via in-app alerts and console logs
mocked_integrations.phone_calls: MOCKED - Phone call simulation via in-app alerts
mocked_integrations.note: Both mocked integrations work as designed. Real Twilio integration would require Twilio credentials in production.

gemini_ai_integration.response: Returns 3 route options with safety scores (0-100), duration, warnings, and recommendations
gemini_ai_integration.test_verified: AI analysis returns proper JSON structure with Fastest, Safest, and Balanced routes
